scope: ACL 2027 supplement page 41 theory hypothesis-boundary companion v2 visual iteration

motivation.target_page_before: Round 12 density audit ranked page 41 as the lowest non-reference page after the grounding v4 pass.
motivation.goal_alignment: Add more registered render material to a text-heavy theory page while preserving the hypothesis-level claim boundary and avoiding a new sparse spill page.

measurement.layout_guard_active_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 238, matching tests/test_paper_layout.py figure-density checks
measurement.page_active245_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 245, used for sparse-page raster review
measurement.red_pixel_fraction_definition: RGB pixels where R > 150, G < 90, and B < 90

claim_boundary.paper_use: visual hypothesis-boundary guide for material salience, coordinate contract, embodied-stack sensitivity, and selected-failure interpretation
claim_boundary.notes: The v2 AI-generated hypothesis-boundary lens is not a causal proof, population rate, metric, benchmark row, or new experiment. Evidence-bearing panels remain registered material, grounding, navigation, and selected-failure render crops.

hypothesis_boundary_v2.role: AI-generated hypothesis-boundary schematic only; deterministic figure code draws critical labels, boundary text, and all evidence-source annotations.

final_figure.local_visual_evidence: The standalone v2 companion adds a selected failure render wall with paired target crops and keeps the AI schematic in a separated bottom lens card. Red fallback remains well below the guard threshold.

pdf_review.local_visual_evidence: Rendered page 41 remains a complete two-column theory page. The in-column companion is visibly denser, no caption or figure-only spill page is introduced, and page 42 still starts the reproducibility section rather than a theory tail.

tests.result: RED first for missing selected failure render wall and v2 source registration; GREEN after implementation: 2 passed, 72 deselected.
completed; pages 40-42 regenerated for local visual and density review.

review_mode.reason: Local pure visual review was used; no separate clean-room subagent was dispatched because independent delegation was not requested.

residual_risk: The rendered page-level density gain is deliberately modest because larger include heights produced a 46-page supplement with a sparse theory spill page.
